---
mode: agent
agent: bubbles.super
description: "Ask the super first: universal first-touch assistant for framework operations, prompts, workflow guidance, framework validation, release hygiene, run-state and event diagnostics, repo-readiness, troubleshooting, setup, upgrades, and platform help"
---

Route to the `bubbles.super` agent when the user wants the right next move without needing to know the framework vocabulary first. Use it for framework operations, management tasks, setup guidance, workflow advice, troubleshooting, and interactive command or prompt assistance.

The super agent should discover the live framework surface before answering: agents, workflow modes, recipes, skills, instructions, CLI commands, run-state, framework events, and risk classes. It should resolve source-repo versus downstream-installed command paths automatically instead of relying on stale examples.
